opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My jaw is completely locked shut, I can barely open my mouth, and the pain is shooting up into my temples. My whole body aches and I'm really distressed — I can't chew or even drink properly and it's been getting worse all day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last 12 hours and it's the worst it's ever been — I can't open my mouth to eat or drink and nothing I've taken has helped.

symptom_narrative.onset: started building up over the last 12 hours or so
symptom_narrative.duration: about half a day and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching, cramping tightness in the jaw muscles that shoots up into my temples
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe, the worst it's ever been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both sides of my jaw and cheeks, up into my temples, and into my neck
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse through the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — cold packs didn't help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to open my mouth, talking, or chewing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my whole body aches and I feel very tense and stressed; my neck feels tight too
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my jaw has been sore and tight before but never locked up this badly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't chew food, I'm struggling to speak clearly, and I can't really drink so I'm worried about getting dehydrated

past_medical_history.how_managed: ongoing, I get widespread body pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I grind and clench my teeth, especially at night

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've been under a lot of stress lately and I'm quite anxious that my jaw might stay locked permanently

objective_data_offered.value: I can only open my mouth a tiny bit — maybe a finger's width
my jaw and cheek muscles feel rock hard and I keep holding the side of my face; I'm talking through clenched teeth
took my temperature at home and it was normal, I don't feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home thermometer
